chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Applications No.S- 194 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.05.2026. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Abdul Rasheed Abro, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Sana Memon, A.P.G for State. = This Criminal Miscellaneous Application has been filed by the applicants, namely Sabir Ali and five others (proposed accused), who are aggrieved by the order passed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge- II/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Dadu, in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.630 of 2026. At the time when the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace ordered the recording of the statement of applicant Zameer Ahmed, the final medical certificate had yet to be issued reflecting the nature of injuries. On the last date of hearing, the applicants filed a statement and also provided a copy to the learned APG, wherein the final medical certificate has now been placed before this Court. In view of the above, I do not find any infirmity and/or irregularity in the impugned order except for a slight modification that the police authorities may record the statement keeping in view all available information including but not limited any/and all information gathered as of the date of recording the statement. Respondent No.2 is directed to complete this exercise within one week. Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of to the extent articulated in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
